title: Segfault in binfmtmisc_linux.go due to an unexpected error
body:
### Issue Description

We're working on a arm64-based platform without binfmt_misc support enabled. We noticed `podman info` crashes.

This is because at [this line](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v5.6.2/pkg/emulation/binfmtmisc_linux.go#L33), `d` is being accessed, but it's nil. The error the code is passed is of type `*fs.PathError`. This happens with Podman v5.6.2 and Go v1.24.1.

Podman v5.4.1 doesn't crash on the same platform.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Disable binfmt_misc support on a Linux machine
2. Run `podman info`


### Describe the results you received

The following trace is printed:

```
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x18 pc=0xaaaac5bd621c]

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation.registeredBinfmtMisc.func1({0xaaaac5f351f0, 0x18}, {0x0, 0x0}, {0xaaaac672e740, 0x40006850e0})
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation/binfmtmisc_linux.go:37 +0x16c
path/filepath.WalkDir({0xaaaac5f351f0, 0x18}, 0x400004d670)
        path/filepath/path.go:398 +0xa0
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation.registeredBinfmtMisc()
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation/binfmtmisc_linux.go:27 +0x54
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation.Registered()
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation/emulation.go:11 +0x1c
github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/domain/infra/abi.(*ContainerEngine).Info(0x4000618008, {0x400061ce00?, 0x400004d868?})
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/domain/infra/abi/system.go:31 +0x38
github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/system.info(0xaaaac738d760, {0xaaaac749f000?, 0x0?, 0x0?})
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/system/info.go:78 +0x58
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0xaaaac738d760, {0x400003c170, 0x0, 0x0})
        github.com/spf13/cobra@v1.9.1/command.go:1015 +0x828
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0xaaaac73745e0)
        github.com/spf13/cobra@v1.9.1/command.go:1148 +0x350
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
        github.com/spf13/cobra@v1.9.1/command.go:1071
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteContext(...)
        github.com/spf13/cobra@v1.9.1/command.go:1064
main.Execute()
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/root.go:120 +0x5c
main.main()
        github.com/containers/podman/v5/cmd/podman/main.go:74 +0x4f4
```

### Describe the results you expected

Podman... doesn't crash.

### podman info output

Not applicable.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

binfmt_misc must be disabled, so that the path `/proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc` won't exist.

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: I've just noticed that the trace contains `github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/emulation/binfmtmisc_linux.go:37 +0x16c`. The actual line is 33, I'm sorry about that. The line number changed because of a local patch I applied to investigate the issue.
